frictions.description: Flet app has structural import error preventing startup
frictions.resolution: Cannot resolve - requires code fix in login_screen.py and possibly other screen files

blockers.description: ImportError: attempted relative import beyond top-level package at screens/login_screen.py line 8
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified error occurs when importing from screens.login_screen - the relative import `from ..services.api_client import api_client` fails because screens is treated as top-level package

summary: Tested 3 assertions (VAL-AUTH-006, VAL-UI-001, VAL-UI-002): all 3 blocked due to ImportError in screens/login_screen.py line 8. The Flet app cannot launch because `from ..services.api_client import api_client` raises 'attempted relative import beyond top-level package'. This is a fundamental import structure issue that prevents any UI testing.
